behavior_summary: Handles an 'U8P_EXCUTION::hatch' event for an egg/item: orchestrates a short scripted scene when an egg hatches.
Plays a music cue, checks and updates the egg's internal X-range/state, and places the avatar in stasis to freeze player input during the sequence.
Performs coordinate-based branching (Z and X comparisons between the egg and avatar) to choose different spawn/animation parameter sets.
Iterates over item data (shape/slots) and spawns multiple short-lived action/animation helpers and a FREE effect at the egg's coordinates to produce visual/sound effects.
Updates the egg's status bits (Item::orStatus) to mark it as hatched/consumed and sequences NPC movement (pathfind) and dialog (Item::bark) lines, suspending between actions to stage the scene.
notable_control_flow: Early branch based on Egg::getEggXRange() to avoid re-running the U8P_EXCUTION::hatch sequence if already set.
Coordinate comparisons (Item::getZ and Item::getX vs avatar) select different spawn/action argument sets (different visual/dialog variants depending on relative position).
Loop/loopnext construct over the egg's contained shapes/items to spawn effects per-slot (uses BP-02h as iterator and BP-04h as temporary slot value).
Sequenced spawn/call/bark/suspend operations to create a multi-step cutscene-like event (spawns and process calls interleaved with suspends).
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of the specific status mask values passed to Item::orStatus (precise gameplay flags are inferred but not named).
Precise identity and behavior of the many small spawned helpers (METHOD::091C, METHOD::15E7) — they appear to be animation/action drivers but their concrete effects are inferred.
Full implications of Egg::setEggXRange(1) beyond serving as a re-run guard: does it gate future interactions or change rendering/AI in other systems?
Exact mapping from spawn argument bytes to animation/action outcomes (direction, action code, timing) — numeric mappings are observed but not fully decoded.

main_function.name: U8P_EXCUTION::hatch
main_function.purpose: Execute the U8P_EXCUTION::hatch event for an egg/item: play audio, freeze player, update egg state, spawn visual/animation helpers, command NPC movement and dialog, and produce a staged in-game scene for the hatching.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the item's U8P_EXCUTION::hatch event (engine event that invokes the egg's U8P_EXCUTION::hatch handler).
Runs only when Egg::getEggXRange() indicates the sequence should proceed (guard prevents re-run).

function_map.name: U8P_EXCUTION::hatch
function_map.role: Primary event handler implementing the U8P_EXCUTION::hatch cutscene and state changes.

function_map.name: U8P_EXCUTION::METHOD::091C
function_map.role: Spawned helper used repeatedly to trigger short animations/actions on a target PID (appears to drive single-step actor animations or effects).

function_map.name: U8P_EXCUTION::METHOD::15E7
function_map.role: Spawned helper paired with METHOD::091C; likely complementary movement/pose/timed behavior driver for the scene.

function_map.name: U8P_EXCUTION::FREE::36E7
function_map.role: Free (utility) routine called during setup; likely performs resource initialization or a one-off effect.

function_map.name: U8P_EXCUTION::FREE::1C6D
function_map.role: Spawned free helper that creates an ephemeral visual effect (corpse/splash/particle) at the egg's CX,CY,CZ coordinates.

function_map.name: playMusic
function_map.role: Play a music/sound cue (used early in the U8P_EXCUTION::hatch sequence).

function_map.name: Item::* / Egg::* / Npc::* (Item::getZ, Item::getX, Item::getCX, Item::getCY, Item::getCZ, Item::orStatus, Egg::getEggXRange, Egg::setEggXRange, Npc::pathfind, Item::bark)
function_map.role: External engine/item/npc APIs used to read coordinates/state, change item status, command pathfinding, and emit dialog.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn repeated short action/animation helpers attached to actors/PIDs to realize staged animations during U8P_EXCUTION::hatch.
Spawned in sequence with METHOD::091C to produce complementary actor behaviors (movement/pose/timing).
Spawn a free effect at the egg's coordinates (visual/sound effect tied to the U8P_EXCUTION::hatch).
Call a free/utility routine during setup; presumed to prepare or reset resources needed for the sequence.

external_calls.purpose: Play a specific music/sound cue to accompany the U8P_EXCUTION::hatch event.
Read an egg-specific guard/state to decide whether to run the U8P_EXCUTION::hatch sequence or which variant to use.
Set the egg X-range/state (written to 1) to mark that the U8P_EXCUTION::hatch sequence has run or to alter future behavior.
Compare egg Z-coordinate against another entity (avatar) to select behavior variant.
Compare egg X-coordinate against another entity (avatar) to select behavior variant.
Retrieve world coordinates to pass to FREE::1C6D to spawn effects at the egg's location.
Set status bits on the egg item (mark as hatched/consumed/disabled to prevent reuse).
Place the avatar into stasis (freeze player actions) while the U8P_EXCUTION::hatch scene runs.
Command NPCs to move to target coordinates as part of the staged sequence.
Emit dialog lines from items/NPCs to narrate the U8P_EXCUTION::hatch scene.

reads.name: Egg::getEggXRange
reads.likely_effect: Gate whether the U8P_EXCUTION::hatch sequence runs or which variant executes (re-run guard).

writes.name: Egg::setEggXRange
writes.likely_effect: Set a guard/state (value 1 observed) to mark the egg's U8P_EXCUTION::hatch-state and prevent immediate re-triggering.

writes.name: Avatar stasis (via setAvatarInStasis)
writes.likely_effect: Freeze/unfreeze player control during the cutscene (written to 1 during sequence).

writes.name: Item status bits (via Item::orStatus)
writes.likely_effect: Mark the egg/item with status flags to change processing/availability after hatching.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Handles an 'U8P_EXCUTION::hatch' event for an egg/item: orchestrates a short scripted scene when an egg hatches.
